name: claude-perm
description: One-click permission toggle for Claude Code — suppress all tool approval prompts with backup support

scripts.build:exe: powershell -Command "Import-Module ps2exe; Invoke-PS2EXE -InputFile src/claude-perm.ps1 -OutputFile dist/claude-perm.exe -noConsole -title 'Claude Code Permission Toggle' -version '1.4.0.0' -supportOS"

author: lanceliu185
